summary: Frontend testing of Remy Chat feature completed successfully. All 10 test scenarios passed. The 3-column layout (Editor | Vista Previa | Chat) works correctly when chat is opened. Chat opens/closes properly, API integration with GPT-5.2 works.
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing data (1 course, 2 chapters, 4 lessons, 9 questions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remy Chat feature fully tested and working. Chat appears as 3rd column when opened via 'Remy' button. API integration with GPT-5.2 confirmed working for edit-lesson-content endpoint.

2_navigate_to_courses.details: Navigation from Dashboard to Cursos page works

3_open_content_editor.details: 'Editar Contenido' button opens CourseContentEditor for the course

4_open_lesson_modal.details: Clicking edit icon on lesson row opens Editar Lección dialog

5_remy_button_appears.details: 'Remy' button appears next to 'Imagen' when lesson has content

6_click_remy_opens_3_columns.details: Clicking 'Remy' button opens chat as 3rd column with grid-cols-3 layout

7_welcome_message_shows_context.details: Chat shows welcome message with lesson/chapter/course context and instruction examples

8_send_message_works.details: Typing message and clicking send works. Loading indicator appears. API responds.

9_close_button_returns_2_columns.details: Clicking X close button closes chat and returns to 2-column grid layout

10_questions_remy_chat.details: Remy Chat also works in AdminQuestions editor with question-specific context

ui_components_verified.data-testid_send-message: PRESENT - send button with Send icon
ui_components_verified.data-testid_close-chat: PRESENT - X close button in chat header

layout_verification.3_column_mode: grid-cols-3 - Editor | Vista Previa | Chat con Remy
layout_verification.chat_container_height: h-[530px] for lessons, h-[500px] for questions
layout_verification.dialog_max_width: max-w-7xl when chat open, max-w-5xl when closed
